entity.summary: Solana-based non-custodial perpetual decentralized exchange supporting leveraged crypto and real-world-asset markets through isolated liquidity pools and on-chain execution.
entity.notes: Current first-party platform describes GMTrade as a wallet-connected Solana perpetual DEX for crypto and real-world-asset markets, using permissionless on-chain execution and pooled liquidity. Current independently maintained metrics report substantial non-zero perpetual volume, TVL, fees, revenue, and open interest. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: GMTrade official perpetual exchange
evidence.notes: Current first-party site identifies GMTrade as a Solana perpetual DEX with wallet-connected leveraged crypto, foreign-exchange, commodity, stock, and index markets.

evidence.title: GMTrade protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current protocol metrics report substantial non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day perpetual volume together with TVL, fees, revenue, and open interest, supporting active classification.
